hero.title: Modular Interventions for Institutions, Faculty & Students
hero.subtitle: Each engagement is designed for measurable outcomes — from pilot programmes to university-wide initiatives, all academically respectful and industry-relevant.

eee.title: EEE — English, Employability & Entrepreneurship
eee.intro: Our flagship, NEP-2020 aligned employability solution — structured, scalable, and deployable from a single certificate course to a multi-semester institutional capability model.

pillars.label: English
pillars.text: Language proficiency, workplace communication and professional confidence.

pillars.label: Employability
pillars.text: Career readiness, workplace awareness and industry-aligned capability.

pillars.label: Entrepreneurship
pillars.text: Entrepreneurial mindset, initiative and ethical, responsible citizenship.

models.title: Certificate Courses
models.text: Focused, credential-bearing modules that fit within existing academic calendars.

models.title: Credit-Linked Programmes
models.text: Integrated into degree structures and aligned to NEP-2020 credit frameworks.

models.title: Value-Added Courses
models.text: Supplementary capability tracks that enrich the core curriculum.

models.title: Multi-Semester Models
models.text: Progressive employability journeys spanning the full duration of study.

models.title: Institutional Frameworks
models.text: University-wide, long-term capability-building ecosystems with phased rollout.

programmes.title: Student Capability Building
programmes.text: Communication, employability, 21st-century skills and final-year readiness bootcamps.

programmes.title: Faculty Development Programmes
programmes.text: 21st-century teaching, learning outcomes and experiential pedagogy for educators.

programmes.title: Institutional & University Engagements
programmes.text: Employability strategy, student development frameworks and phased rollouts.

programmes.title: University Partnerships
programmes.text: Long-term collaborations with MoU-backed governance and shared outcomes.

programmes.title: Placement & Career Facilitation
programmes.text: Beyond training — confidence, mock interviews and workplace readiness.

programmes.title: Overseas Career Readiness
programmes.text: Global employability with CEFR & OET training — positioned as career readiness, not a visa service.
